$comment: plan: the thin composition layer. Read every .spec in a dir, then have the model infer a build plan - units in dependency order + canonical contracts - normalizing messy/unordered/inconsistent specs. Output is schema-forced so a compose foreach can consume it directly. Input = the spec dir (relative to the ratchet root).
summary: Infer an ordered build plan (units + dependencies + canonical contracts) from a directory of .spec files.
